title: CRC Sun A walk 26th April Great Offley
drivingInstructions: Leave on the slip road signposted Great Offley, go up the hill and at the first crossroads turn left onto High Street/Kings Walden Road. Turn right into Salusbury Lane; soon after a right hand bend, park in a lay-by on the left.
parking: Lay-by on the left of Salusbury Lane
description: A scenic walk along the River Cam passing through meadows and historic colleges. The walk takes in a number of woods with bluebells. 9 miles am and 5.5 miles pm.

title: Wednesday A walk starting from Anglesey Abbey
parking: The car park of Anglesey Abbey NT, CB25 9EJ. No charge.
walkStart: Entrance to the grassed overflow car park
description: Morning via Stow Cum Quy, Little Wilbraham River and Bottisham. Afternoon explores local droves.

title: Balsham
drivingInstructions: From Cambridge take road through Fulbourn to Balsham.  In Balsham, where road turns sharp right take a left by the side of the bandstand. Follow the very narrow road to carpark.
walkStart: Meet in the church carpark CB21 4DS
description: The walk is about 6 miles over fields to West Wratting and back to Balsham. Expect mud especially if it’s rained recently.

title: Wednesday A walk Trumpington Park and Ride
drivingInstructions: From Cambridge take road through Fulbourn to Balsham.  In Balsham, where road turns sharp right take a left by the side of the bandstand. Follow the very narrow road to carpark.
walkStart: Meet at the John Lewis building
description: The walk takes us across to Clay Farm, onto the outskirts of Great Shelford, over to Hauxton and stopping for lunch at Haslingfield.  We return via the outskirts of Grantchester.
